themes.reasoning_notes: Creates a large batch of Wolf creature tokens based on Forest count; quintessential token-maker and board-wide payoff.
Turns a developed mana base into a wide board of bodies, often functioning as a late-game swarm finisher.
Rewards having many Forests in play, so it scales directly with land ramp and mono-green mana development.
